channel.title: Publications on Fan Lyu
channel.description: Recent content in Publications on Fan Lyu

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2021 (New) Fan Lyu, Shuai Wang, Wei Feng, Zihan Ye, Fuyuan Hu, Song Wang. Multi-domain Multi-task Rehearsal for Lifelong Learning[C]//In Proceedings of The Thirty-Fifth AAAI Conference on Artiﬁcial Intelligence (AAAI), 2021 (Accepted). [paper] 2020 Chaorui Deng, Qi Wu, Qingyao Wu, Fan Lyu, Fuyuan Hu, Mingkui Tan. Visual Grounding via Accumulated Attention[J]. IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2020 (Early Access). [paper] Shuai Wang, Fan Lyu, Wei Feng, Song Wang.
